title: Tangy Black Treacle Crumble
description: A sweet and tangy Indian dessert made with black treacle, tangy crumble, and a hint of Ukrainian flair.
instructions: Mix together black treacle, brown sugar, cardamom powder, and salt in a large bowl.
Combine Ukrainian rye flour and coconut oil in another bowl to form a crumbly mixture.
Add the crumble mixture to the treacle mixture and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes.
While the crumble is baking, prepare the topping by mixing together tangy crumble and a pinch of salt.
Once the crumble is done, top it with the crumble mixture and return to the oven for an additional 5-10 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
